=== vdivider_connected
# VDivider Connected in a 3-col window: Label|VDivider|Label.
# VDivider touches top and bottom borders → CrossT (╤) and CrossB (╧).
widget: junction
layout: vdivider_connected
width: 24
height: 5
===
╔══════════╤═══════════╗
║Left      │Right      ║
║          │           ║
║          │           ║
╚══════════╧═══════════╝

=== hdivider_inner_cross
# VDivider(Connected) full-height at left, HDivider(Connected) at right-col mid-row.
# VDivider: CrossT + CrossB at outer borders.
# HDivider: InnerCrossL (├) where it starts next to VDivider; CrossR (╢) at right border.
widget: junction
layout: hdivider_inner_cross
width: 24
height: 7
===
╔╤═════════════════════╗
║│Top                  ║
║│                     ║
║├─────────────────────╢
║│Bottom               ║
║│                     ║
╚╧═════════════════════╝

=== vdivider_inner_cross
# HDivider(Connected) full-width at top row, VDivider(Connected) in mid-col bottom row.
# HDivider: CrossL (╟) + CrossR (╢) at outer borders.
# VDivider: InnerCrossT (┬) where it starts below HDivider; CrossB (╧) at bottom border.
widget: junction
layout: vdivider_inner_cross
width: 24
height: 7
===
╔══════════════════════╗
╟──────────┬───────────╢
║Left      │Right      ║
║          │           ║
║          │           ║
║          │           ║
╚══════════╧═══════════╝

=== grid_cross
# 3×3 grid: VDivider full-height at col 1, HDividers at row 1 in col 0 and col 2.
# CrossT + CrossB on VDivider (outer borders).
# CrossL on HDivider(col=0) (left outer border).
# CrossR on HDivider(col=2) (right outer border).
# CrossX (┼) where both HDividers meet the VDivider — upgraded from InnerCrossR+InnerCrossL.
widget: junction
layout: grid_cross
width: 24
height: 9
===
╔═══════════╤══════════╗
║TL         │TR        ║
║           │          ║
║           │          ║
╟───────────┼──────────╢
║BL         │BR        ║
║           │          ║
║           │          ║
╚═══════════╧══════════╝
